title: bupleurum petraeum var. glogosum
intro: Bupleurum petraeum var. glogosum, also known as Rock Bupleurum, is a variety of the Bupleurum plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rock Bupleurum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and digestive issues, as well as having immunomodulatory effects. Rock Bupleurum is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to tonify the spleen and liver, and to balance the body's energy.
